root_text.sn46.42:1.1: “Rañño, bhikkhave, cakkavattissa pātubhāvā sattannaṁ ratanānaṁ pātubhāvo hoti.
root_text.sn46.42:1.3: Cakkaratanassa pātubhāvo hoti, hatthiratanassa pātubhāvo hoti, assaratanassa pātubhāvo hoti, maṇiratanassa pātubhāvo hoti, itthiratanassa pātubhāvo hoti, gahapatiratanassa pātubhāvo hoti, pariṇāyakaratanassa pātubhāvo hoti.
root_text.sn46.42:1.4: Rañño, bhikkhave, cakkavattissa pātubhāvā imesaṁ sattannaṁ ratanānaṁ pātubhāvo hoti.
root_text.sn46.42:2.1: Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, pātubhāvā arahato sammāsambuddhassa sattannaṁ bojjhaṅgaratanānaṁ pātubhāvo hoti.
root_text.sn46.42:2.3: Satisambojjhaṅgassa ratanassa pātubhāvo hoti …pe… upekkhāsambojjhaṅgassa ratanassa pātubhāvo hoti.
root_text.sn46.42:2.4: Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, pātubhāvā arahato sammāsambuddhassa imesaṁ sattannaṁ bojjhaṅgaratanānaṁ pātubhāvo hotī”ti.

translation_text.sn46.42:1.1: “Mendicants, when a Wheel-Turning Monarch appears seven treasures appear.
translation_text.sn46.42:1.3: The wheel, the elephant, the horse, the jewel, the woman, the householder, and the commander.
translation_text.sn46.42:1.4: When a Wheel-Turning Monarch appears these seven treasures appear.
translation_text.sn46.42:2.1: When a Realized One, a perfected one, a fully awakened Buddha appears the seven treasures of the awakening factors appear.
translation_text.sn46.42:2.3: The treasures of the awakening factors of mindfulness, investigation of principles, energy, rapture, tranquility, immersion, and equanimity.
translation_text.sn46.42:2.4: When a Realized One, a perfected one, a fully awakened Buddha appears these seven treasures of the awakening factors appear.”
